title: An Ordinance authorizing the temporary closure of the entire stretch of M. Palis Street, J.P. Rizal Street, Jamboree Road in Barangay Timugan, Los Baños, Laguna; Luna Street, Lopez Street, Jaena Street, De Pasupil Street, Burgos Street, Villegas Street in Barangay Baybayin, Los Baños, Laguna; and Apolinario Street, Barangay Baybayin to Barangay Malinta Boundary for the conduct of events for the celebration of the 24th Bañamos Festival in conjunction with the Town's 410th Foundation Anniversary
